Description: Porcine teschovirus-1 2A self-cleaving peptide used for multicistronic expression and near-equimolar protein production.
Thosea asigna virus 2A self-cleaving peptide commonly used in mammalian bicistronic and multicistronic constructs.
Equine rhinitis A virus 2A self-cleaving peptide used to separate two open reading frames in a single transcript.
